raw.problem: Foundries burn coke; switching to green reductants is unproven at scale.
raw.why_now: Buyers now demand scope-3 low-carbon castings.
raw.proof_of_work: Lab reductant cuts emissions 60% in test.
raw.success_scenario: If OEMs mandate low-carbon, offtake follows.

structured.tagline: Enabling foundries to cut emissions 60% with green reductants.
structured.problem: Foundries burn coke; switching to green reductants is unproven at scale.
structured.differentiator: Ex-Tata metallurgists developed lab reductant cutting emissions 60%, licensed to foundries.
structured.solution: Lab-proven green reductant cutting emissions 60% for foundries.
structured.ask: Seeking a co-founder for green foundry reductant licensing.
